data.description: In London on February 17, 2026, Shield Therapeutics plc revealed that ACCRUFeR® (ferric maltol) has become the initial and sole prescribed oral iron remedy recognized by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for managing iron deficiency in children aged 10 and above. data.title: Ski-Doo introduces 2027 lineup with REV Gen5 platform, uMotion rear suspension, Expedition LE model, and Rotax 600RR E-TEC engine for more power and comfort.
data.description: In the upcoming 2027 Ski-Doo lineup, significant changes can be seen with the Skandic and Tundra models transitioning to the REV Gen5 platform. This move includes the incorporation of uMotion rear suspension to enhance both comfort and capability during rides. A notable addition to the lineup is the Expedition LE model which offers the best price and value option. The introduction of the new Rotax 600RR E-TEC engine is set to provide class-leading power. This engine also promises lower operating costs, making it a desirable choice for riders looking for an optimal balance of performance and efficiency.

data.title: Dr. Krishnan Suthanthiran discusses potential energy project in Kitsault with Canada, Enbridge CEO, & investors. Kitsault has infrastructure for new project, supported by $50 billion LNG Canada initiative.
data.description: Dr. Suthanthiran is the owner of Kitsault, a town situated northwest of Prince Rupert. Originally established as a mining community by Amax Canada Development Ltd., Kitsault used to house around 1,200 workers and their families. Presently, Kitsault is positioned as a highly advantageous site for launching a new energy venture, with existing infrastructure that surpasses other significant energy initiatives like the $50 billion LNG Canada project.

data.title: Nuburu Inc. closes $12M public offering, resumes NYSE trading on March 2, halted due to low price below $0.10.
data.description: DENVER--NUBURU, Inc. revealed the completion of its public offering and expects to resume trading on NYSE American on March 2, 2026. Trading of its common stock was paused on February 13, 2026, due to the price falling below NYSE American’s Minimum Trading Price of $0.10. The company will implement a 1-for-4.99 reverse stock split in order to address this issue. NUBURU, Inc. is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol BURU and operates as a dual-use Defense & Security platform business.

data.title: Capvidia and Hexagon hosting webinar on building digital thread from design to inspection, using MBD, QIF, and PC-DMIS.
data.description: Capvidia, a prominent company specializing in Model-Based Definition (MBD) and model-based interoperability, has revealed plans to collaborate with Hexagon in hosting a live webinar. The webinar aims to emphasize the establishment of a cohesive digital thread linking the design, production, and inspection processes through the strategic application of MBD, the Quality Information Framework (QIF), and Hexagon’s PC-DMIS metrology software. This webinar, titled “Connected for Success: Unlock seamless data flow and precision from design to inspection,” is scheduled to occur on Wednesday.

data.title: Princess Cruises offers special deals on 2026 cruises to Alaska, Hawaii, and Canada/New England to celebrate America's 250th anniversary.
data.description: Set sail on an unforgettable journey from coast to coast with the launch of the "Princess Signature Sale." Don't miss out on this opportunity to be a part of history with Princess Cruises.
